mapper.sql: id, name, email, avatar, role, department, dept_code, sub_org_cd, sub_org_nam, company_cd, chinese_nam, skills, password, joined_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE department = #{department} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (id, name, email, avatar, role, department, dept_code, sub_org_cd, sub_org_nam, company_cd, chinese_nam, skills, password, joined_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{department}, #{deptCode}, #{subOrgCd}, #{subOrgNam}, #{companyCd}, #{chineseNam}, #{skills}, #{password}, #{joinedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM sys_user WHERE id LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTRING(id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE 1=1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_user (id, name, chinese_nam, email, role, department, dept_code, sub_org_cd, sub_org_nam, company_cd, joined_at, created_at, updated_at, password) SELECT p.EMP_NUM, p.EMP_NAM, IFNULL(p.CHINESE_NAM, ''), p.EMAIL_ADDR, 'member', o.ORG_NAM, IFNULL(p.ORG_CD, ''), IFNULL(p.SUB_ORG_CD, ''), IFNULL(o2.ORG_NAM, ''), IFNULL(p.COMPANY_CD, ''), NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), '1' FROM mdm_if_pa_a p LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o ON p.ORG_CD = o.ORG_CD LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o2 ON p.SUB_ORG_CD = o2.ORG_CD WHERE p.EMP_NAM IS NOT NULL AND p.EMAIL_ADDR IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user u INNER JOIN mdm_if_pa_a p ON u.id = p.EMP_NUM COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o ON p.ORG_CD = o.ORG_CD LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o2 ON p.SUB_ORG_CD = o2.ORG_CD SET u.name = p.EMP_NAM, u.chinese_nam = IFNULL(p.CHINESE_NAM, ''), u.email = p.EMAIL_ADDR, u.department = o.ORG_NAM, u.dept_code = IFNULL(p.ORG_CD, ''), u.sub_org_cd = IFNULL(p.SUB_ORG_CD, ''), u.sub_org_nam = IFNULL(o2.ORG_NAM, ''), u.company_cd = IFNULL(p.COMPANY_CD, ''), u.updated_at = NOW() WHERE p.EMP_NAM IS NOT NULL AND p.EMAIL_ADDR IS NOT NULL
